mapper.select: SELECT rule_id AS ruleId, user_seq AS userSeq, day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, method_code AS methodCode, generator_code AS generatorCode, set_count AS setCount, analysis_draw_count AS analysisDrawCount, sort_order AS sortOrder, use_yn AS useYn, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM generation_rule WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY day_of_week, sort_order, rule_id
SELECT DISTINCT user_seq FROM generation_rule WHERE day_of_week = #{dayOfWeek} AND use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT result_id AS resultId, draw_no AS drawNo, draw_date AS drawDate, no1 AS no1, no2 AS no2, no3 AS no3, no4 AS no4, no5 AS no5, no6 AS no6, bonus_no AS bonusNo FROM satto_draw_result ORDER BY draw_no DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO satto_number_set ( user_seq, rule_id, target_year, target_month, target_week_of_month, draw_no, method_code, generator_code, no1, no2, no3, no4, no5, no6 ) VALUES ( #{userSeq}, #{ruleId}, #{targetYear}, #{targetMonth}, #{targetWeekOfMonth}, #{drawNo}, #{methodCode}, #{generatorCode}, #{no1}, #{no2}, #{no3}, #{no4}, #{no5}, #{no6} )
mapper.select: SELECT set_id AS setId, user_seq AS userSeq, rule_id AS ruleId, target_year AS targetYear, target_month AS targetMonth, target_week_of_month AS targetWeekOfMonth, draw_no AS drawNo, method_code AS methodCode, generator_code AS generatorCode, no1 AS no1, no2 AS no2, no3 AS no3, no4 AS no4, no5 AS no5, no6 AS no6, created_at AS createdAt FROM satto_number_set WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} AND target_year = #{targetYear} AND target_month = #{targetMonth} AND target_week_of_month = #{targetWeekOfMonth} ORDER BY rule_id, set_id
